description:
A high-security encrypted volume requires dual-factor authentication to access. Mount the VeraCrypt volume using both a password and a keyfile, then document the volume's contents.

Volume details:
- Volume file: /home/ga/Volumes/secure_finance.hc
- Mount point: /home/ga/MountPoints/slot1
- Password: Quarterly2024!
- Keyfile: /home/ga/Keyfiles/finance_key.dat
- Both the password AND the keyfile are required to mount this volume. Using only one will fail.

After successfully mounting the volume:
- List the files inside the mounted volume
- Save the listing to /home/ga/Documents/volume_contents.txt (one filename per line)

You may use either the VeraCrypt GUI or the command line to complete this task.
